title: Chain Slide
description: Allows players to climb and quickly slide down chains, iron bars, bamboo, end rods, and fences.
body:
# Chain Slide **Stop slowly descending ladders. Start sliding! 🧗‍♂️🚒** Chain Slide revolutionizes vertical movement in Minecraft. It allows you to intuitively climb up and **rapidly slide down** various pole-like blocks that were previously merely decorative. Move through your world like a firefighter! --- ## Key Features * **Intuitive Mechanics:** Simply walk into a supported block to grab onto it. Hold space to climb up, or let go to slide down quickly. * **Fast Descent:** Sliding down is significantly faster than climbing down a vanilla ladder, making it perfect for tall builds or deep caves. * **Precise Hitboxes:** Includes custom collision detection for tricky blocks like bamboo, ensuring you always grab them correctly. * **Fully Configurable:** Don't want fences to be climbable? Turn them off easily in the settings menu. --- ## Supported Blocks It’s not just for chains! Almost any pole-like block is supported right out of the box. ⛓️🪵 ![Climbable Blocks Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a71dc70fb41c284a2cead3aa83b62fcea44a1dea.png) *Chain variants, Iron Bars, Copper Bars, Bamboo, End Rods, and Fences.* ### Natural Exploration Navigating jungles has never been easier. Use naturally generated bamboo stalks as instant elevators. 🎋 ![Bamboo Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a574e052ad5c1aa2336a0795e0682d038f10ad96.png) --- ## Configuration The mod works instantly, but everything is customizable. If you have **ModMenu** and **Cloth Config API** installed, you can access an easy-to-use configuration screen to toggle specific categories on or off. ⚙️🛠️ ![In-Game Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/840f04d0c344856ec4ff702ce912503661f8c581_0.webp) --- ## Installation & Requirements This mod is for **Fabric**. 1. Install **Fabric Loader**. 2. Download the `chain_slide.jar` and place it in your `/mods` folder. 3. **Required Dependency:** You must install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). 4. **Recommended:** Install [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the in-game configuration settings. --- ## See it in Action Experience the difference between climbing and the new fast-sliding mechanic:

Effortless Climbing

Just walk into the block to climb up. 🧗‍♂️

Rapid Sliding

Let go to slide down at double speed! 🚒
--- *Enjoy your new vertical mobility!*
